ns0:entry.ns0:title: Diniboy1123/usque
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Diniboy1123/usque
Language: go
Open-source reimplementation of the Cloudflare WARP client's MASQUE protocol.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
Language: go
CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FiloSottile/mkcert
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FiloSottile/mkcert
Language: go
A simple zero-config tool to make locally trusted development certificates with any names you'd like.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: casdoor/casdoor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor
Language: go
An open-source Agent-first Identity and Access Management (IAM) /LLM MCP & agent gateway and auth server with web UI supporting OpenClaw, MCP, OAuth, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, SCIM, WebAuthn, TOTP, MFA, Face ID, Google Workspace, Azure AD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: e2b-dev/infra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/e2b-dev/infra
Language: go
Infrastructure that's powering E2B Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evcc-io/evcc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evcc-io/evcc
Language: go
solar charging ☀️🚘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/mcp-grafana
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/mcp-grafana
Language: go
MCP server for Grafana

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gruntwork-io/terragrunt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt
Language: go
Terragrunt is a flexible orchestration tool that allows Infrastructure as Code written in OpenTofu/Terraform to scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: guohuiyuan/go-music-dl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/guohuiyuan/go-music-dl
Language: go
一个基于 Go 语言的全网音乐搜索与下载工具。支持 CLI 命令行与 Web 服务双模式，内置网易云、QQ、酷狗、Bilibili、汽水音乐等 10+ 个主流平台，支持多源并发搜索与无损音质解析。music-dl交流群：1074285005

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: helm/helm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/helm/helm
Language: go
The Kubernetes Package Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kagent-dev/kagent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kagent-dev/kagent
Language: go
Cloud Native Agentic AI | Discord: https://bit.ly/kagentdiscord

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/gateway-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/gateway-api
Language: go
Repository for the next iteration of composite service (e.g. Ingress) and load balancing APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: looplj/axonhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/looplj/axonhub
Language: go
⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maximhq/bifrost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maximhq/bifrost
Language: go
Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mostlygeek/llama-swap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap
Language: go
Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qax-os/excelize
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qax-os/excelize
Language: go
Go language library for reading and writing Microsoft Excel™ (XLAM / XLSM / XLSX / XLTM / XLTX) spreadsheets

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/go-redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/go-redis
Language: go
Redis Go client

ns0:entry.ns0:title: syncthing/syncthing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/syncthing/syncthing
Language: go
Open Source Continuous File Synchronization
